𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨!!!

𝐈𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐦𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐚𝐠𝐞:

Bova stood at attention in the dimly lit room, flanked by Captain Price and the rest of Task Force 141. The atmosphere was thick with tension as Captain Price initiated the video call. General Shepherd's stern visage appeared on the screen.

"Price," Shepherd began, his voice authoritative, "we've got a critical mission ahead. Failure is not an option."

Price nodded, his expression resolute. "I'm aware of the stakes, General. But I need more information."

"Yes, yes", Shepherd said almost dismissively, waving the Captain off with one hand. As if he was some fly the General needed to swat away. "The information is on its way, don't worry. Just make sure your team is ready once you have it."

"I don't even know what I'm getting my team into, Shepherd. I have no location, no targets, nothing. You can't say you have an important mission and then refuse to give out any information! Especially not crucial one!", Price's hand balled into a tight fist, his frustration evident.

Before they could delve into further arguments, Phillip Graves' smug face appeared beside Shepherd. "For this mission", Graves interjected while smirking, "you've been assigned one of my Shadows."

The announcement was met with immediate protest from Task Force 141. Ghost crossed his arms, his masked face betraying a scowl. Soap muttered curses under his breath - his scottish accent more prominent than usual -, while Gaz shook his head in disbelief. Bova's eyes narrowed, his distrust for Graves evident.

"Hold on, Graves," Price said, his voice firm. "We don't need—"

Before he could finish, the door to the meeting room swung open. An unfamiliar figure stepped in, clad in Shadow Company gear. Bova instinctively reached for his sidearm but stopped short, recognizing the insignia.

The Shadow was already among them.


𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐨:

! Bova is a real person and a Call of Duty OC Cosplayer. His Socials are linked bellow the banner.

! This scenario is original, don't copy it.
